titleStmt.funder: IslHornAfr: Islam in the Horn of Africa, A Comparative Literary Approach. European Research Council (Advanced Grant no. 322849)

altIdentifier.collection: IslHornAfr: Islam in the Horn of Africa

msItem.title: Registry of marriages and transactions

msItem.note: Collection of different registry records regarding marriage, divorce, inheritance.

msItem.title: قران
msItem.note: Translation of the Fātiḥa in Afaan Oromo.

msItem.title: Registry of deaths and inheritances
msItem.note: Names without other references have been omitted

decoNote.q: Sūra headings, long a-vowels, taǧwīd, ḥizb and verse markers (three dots) in red. Markers for the eighths in black.

item.q: واظهر الذال حفص | وقرا ابو عمر وبالإدغام
حكى البعض انه بنون واحدة واد الشاطبي باذ الحق انه بنونين اه من المضبوط
item.note: Fragment of an unidentified work entitled "al-Maḍbūṭ"

item.q: بالمد فى القرآء السبعة ويجوز نهم قصر همزة الاولى الثانية والاول اوضح
item.note: Note on the variants of other Qur'anic readings

item.q: Invocation for the end of Ḏū'l-Ḥiǧǧa
Fa'ida about basic rules of Arabic grammar

origDate.date: 1907 1946 On the basis of the dates in the registry.
1325 1369 From the dates expressed in the registry entries.

projectDesc.p: Encoded according to TEI P5 Guidelines.

encodingDesc.p: Encoded according to the Beta maṣāḥǝft Guidelines. These Guidelines detail the TEI format ruled by the Beta maṣāḥǝft Schema. The present TEI file is enriched with an Xquery transformation taking advantage of the exist-db database instance where the data is stored and of the many external resources to which this data points to.

calendar.p: ʿĀmata ʿālam/ʿĀmata ʾəm-fəṭrat (Era of the World)
ʿĀmata śəggāwe (Era of the Incarnation – Ethiopian)

revisionDesc.change: Created file from XML export sent by Michele Petrone
